channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: MCT appoints TSN senior journalists as judges for 16th EJAT journalism awards
item.description: The Media Council of Tanzania (MCT) has officially appointed 12 judges for the 16th Edition of the Excellence in Journalism Awards Tanzania (EJAT), with two senior staff members from the Tanzania Stan...

item.title: 1Sambayan urges legal compliance in proposed West Philippine Sea energy deals

item.title: Kejriwal requests Justice Sharma’s recusal in Delhi High Court proceedings
item.description: Delhi Chief Minister Arvind Kejriwal made an appearance before Justice Neena Sharma in the Delhi High Court on Tuesday, requesting her to withdraw from hearing a petition related to an ongoing inquiry...

item.title: Statistics Canada reports widening income and wealth gaps in Canada for 2025
item.description: According to Statistics Canada, the income gap between the richest and poorest Canadians continued to widen in 2025. The agency measured the difference in the share of disposable income between househ...

item.title: US outlines Strait of Hormuz blockade plan amid rising Middle East tensions and ongoing Lebanon conflict
item.description: The United States has escalated tensions in the Middle East by moving forward with a blockade strategy targeting the Strait of Hormuz, a critical global shipping route. President Donald Trump announce...

item.title: Calls grow for increased support services and policing after Grand Falls-Windsor shootings linked to intimate partner violence
item.description: A series of violent incidents in Grand Falls-Windsor, Newfoundland and Labrador, has left the community in shock and renewed urgent calls for stronger protections against intimate partner violence. Wi...

item.title: PSX benchmark KSE-100 declines by 6,600 points amid US-Iran tensions and Hormuz blockade concerns
item.description: The Pakistan Stock Exchange witnessed a sharp decline on Monday as the benchmark KSE-100 index shed 6,600 points in a highly volatile trading session. The market opened low near 161,000 points compare...

item.title: Mayor Zohran Mamdani marks 100 days in office, outlines policy progress and future reforms in New York
item.description: New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani marked his first 100 days in office with a public rally in Queens, where he defended and promoted his openly “socialist” political agenda. Speaking to a large gathering, ...

item.title: Trump–Pope tensions rise amid criticism over war, immigration, and foreign policy remarks

item.title: DILG Confirms Businessman Charlie 'Atong' Ang Spotted in the Philippines as Manhunt Continues

item.title: Harry and Meghan begin private four-day visit to Australia combining charity and commercial events

item.title: Western Cape expands foot-and-mouth vaccination programme amid ongoing outbreak
item.description: The Western Cape provincial government in South Africa has significantly strengthened its response to an ongoing foot-and-mouth disease outbreak by increasing its vaccination efforts. According to rep...

item.title: Understanding local dynamics in the Strait of Hormuz amid the 2026 US blockade
item.description: Following the collapse of ceasefire negotiations, US President Donald Trump has imposed a blockade on the Strait of Hormuz, a critical chokepoint for global oil and gas shipments. This escalation form...

item.title: Edo Police Bust Criminal Network Involving Officers and Civilians Over Abduction and Extortion
item.description: The Edo State Police Command has successfully dismantled an organised extortion and abduction syndicate operating within Benin City and its surrounding areas. According to the Police Public Relations ...

item.title: Mombasa boxing official Lela Said earns historic IBA 3-Star certification and breaks barriers in officiating
item.description: Lela Said, a Mombasa-based boxing referee and judge, has made history by becoming the first woman in Kenya and East Africa to achieve the prestigious International Boxing Association (IBA) 3-Star Refe...

item.title: African firms urged to adopt scalable ecosystem strategies for growth in digital economy
item.description: Professor Nkemdilim Iheanachor of strategic management at Pan-Atlantic University has called on African businesses to rethink how they build and scale their operations in today’s digital-driven econom...

item.title: Umar Khalid moves Supreme Court for open hearing in bail review plea in Delhi riots case
item.description: Former JNU student Umar Khalid has approached the Supreme Court seeking an open court hearing and oral arguments in his review petition challenging the court’s earlier decision denying him bail in the...
